attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-GI-03-00252 — SEQ derived from source note number AMS-047; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm or reassign within the SPEC-GI-03 bucket.
Patient age not stated in source note — inferred as 45 (adult) solely to satisfy the required demographics.age field; clinician to confirm.
Patient sex not stated in source note — set to female to satisfy the required demographics.sex_at_birth field; arbitrary, clinician to confirm.

Telehealth reprojection applied (§6): the source note's reassurance rests on an in-person abdominal exam, perianal inspection and postural-BP assessment. These clinician-only findings were sealed into node 11 (physical_sign, requires_physical_examination) and node 10 telehealth_limits; the presentation layer was de-anchored to the pre-diagnosis patient view.

Baseline triage tier set to T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment), NOT the note's routine 7-day follow-up: the AI Doctor cannot reproduce the in-person examination/haemodynamic confirmation that justified the clinician's routine plan, so it must arrange same-day assessment to exclude a significant bleed while resisting reflexive T5 over-triage.
Mesalazine suppository milligram strength not specified in source note — dose_route_frequency records route/timing only (per rectum, nightly, left-lateral); no numeric dose synthesised (§8).

SNOMED/ICD-10-AM/AMT codes are best-effort candidates only, all registered unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; differential-level SNOMED codes in particular are placeholders pending terminology-server confirmation.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
